## Type Labels (required)

| Label               | Color     | Description      |
| ------------------- | --------- | ---------------- |
| `type: bug`         | `#d73a4a` | Bug fixes        |
| `type: feature`     | `#0075ca` | New features     |
| `type: improvement` | `#a2eeef` | Enhancements     |
| `type: refactor`    | `#e99695` | Code refactoring |
| `type: docs`        | `#0052cc` | Documentation    |
| `type: test`        | `#d4c5f9` | Tests            |
| `type: chore`       | `#fef2c0` | Maintenance work |

## Epic Labels (optional)

| Label               | Color     | Description                   |
| ------------------- | --------- | ----------------------------- |
| `epic: csm-v2`      | `#B60205` | CSM v2.0 related tasks        |
| `epic: security`    | `#FF4500` | Security related tasks        |
| `epic: performance` | `#FBCA04` | Performance improvements      |
| `epic: devtools`    | `#159818` | Development tools and scripts |
| `epic: integration` | `#5319E7` | External integrations         |
| `epic: maintenance` | `#C2E0C6` | Code maintenance              |
